r":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471974672234466366","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流+宿敌+微群像+微恐+双强+反转】
清冷病弱嘴毒【时间】受vs腹黑白切黑【镜子】攻
猩红之月高挂天际，黄昏之幕笼罩世界。
清脆的机械音回荡耳畔：“黄昏降临啦！”
一场杀戮的屠宰游戏，将所有人拖入无尽深渊。
没有人愿意成为别人活下去的垫脚石，路晚苍也不想，所以他将别人的命作为自己活下去的垫脚石。
系统：666盐豆不盐了，你个杀人魔，你卑鄙、冷血，无情无义，你自私，你……
路晚苍：“感谢夸奖。”
系统:“-”
……
一开始，路晚苍觉得系统是这场荒诞游戏的幕后主使，但随着时间推移，他发现事情好像有点不太对劲:
“坏了，这游戏……好像是我的手笔。”
坏事一箩筐，不止如此，路晚苍还发现那场把所有人都算进去的棋局，也是他做的。

“你是一个没有未来的人，但你拥有无尽过去。”

路晚苍和荀无疏的孽缘说不尽。
初次见面，荀无疏扔了只蜘蛛到他怀里，二次见面，路晚苍把蛇放进他帐篷。
冤冤相报何时了，世界都崩坏了，他们还在副本里纠缠不清。
后来路晚苍才发现，这不叫孽缘。

叫还债。

原来厌恶不等于不爱，原来爱和恨可以共存。
机关算尽也会棋差一招，恨意刻骨也会屡次低头。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc7979f91420d12e53d8864152a50a50d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我见春和","author_id":"","book_id":"7471974672234466366","book_name":"无限游戏：黄昏时刻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":839,"name":"久别重逢","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=839&name=久别重逢&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7484125023003755070","read_count":"391","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"809062"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"326","tags":"双男主,无限流,强强,现代,久别重逢,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc7979f91420d12e53d8864152a50a50d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361380&x-signature=aEsGFFP%2BPPf9I8tZxGhssOuZzc0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2322632850023259","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"105"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190300FABA2C6401AF1887A502"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"
